channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: After Fresh US Strikes On Iran, Trump Briefs Netanyahu On "Moves In Gulf"

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump briefed Benjamin Netanyahu on Thursday about US operations in the Gulf.

item.description: US President Donald Trump briefed Benjamin Netanyahu on Thursday about US operations in the Gulf, the Israeli Prime Minister's office said, said, after Iran reported fresh American strikes.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump briefed Benjamin Netanyahu on Thursday about US operations in the Gulf, the Israeli Prime Minister's office said, said, after Iran reported fresh American strikes.

item.title: Ali Khamenei Buried Amid Fresh US-Iran Fighting

media:content.media:description: Ali Khamenei was buried in his home city of Mashhad in eastern Iran on Friday.

item.description: Former Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei was buried Friday in his home city of Mashhad, state television reported, following a ceremony at which his son and successor was not seen.
item.content:encoded: Former Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei was buried Friday in his home city of Mashhad, state television reported, following a ceremony at which his son and successor was not seen.

item.title: Syria Says ISIS Was Behind Damascus Bombings During Macron's Visit

media:content.media:description: An official with Syria's Internal Security Forces said the Islamic State group was behind the bombings.

item.description: A Syrian security official said Thursday that the cell responsible for two bomb blasts during French President Emmanuel Macron's visit to Damascus this week was affiliated with the Islamic State group.
item.content:encoded: A Syrian security official said Thursday that the cell responsible for two bomb blasts during French President Emmanuel Macron's visit to Damascus this week was affiliated with the Islamic State group.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquake: Death Count Rises To 3,889, Nearly 17,000 Injured

media:content.media:description: The United Nations is meanwhile trying to raise some $300 million in recovery funds for Venezuela.

item.description: The death toll from the powerful twin tremors that struck Venezuela two weeks ago has risen to at least 3,889, a government report published Thursday stated.
item.content:encoded: The death toll from the powerful twin tremors that struck Venezuela two weeks ago has risen to at least 3,889, a government report published Thursday stated.

item.title: North Korea Decides On Measures To Strengthen Its Nuclear Forces: Report

media:content.media:description: Kim Jong Un inspecting weapons at North Korea's National Defence Science Research Institute.

item.description: North Korea has decided on measures to strengthen its nuclear forces "quantitatively and qualitatively" as leader Kim Jong Un called for modernising its military, state media KCNA reported on Friday.
item.content:encoded: North Korea has decided on measures to strengthen its nuclear forces "quantitatively and qualitatively" as leader Kim Jong Un called for modernising its military, state media KCNA reported on Friday.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Reports Fresh American Strikes, Trump Updates Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.
item.content:encoded: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.

item.title: US Holds Off New Tariffs On Commercial Aircraft Imports

media:content.media:description: Trump's proclamation nonetheless keeps the door open to the possibility of further action down the line.

item.description: The United States has refrained from imposing new tariffs on commercial aircraft and parts after an investigation into the sector, according to a proclamation signed Thursday by President Donald Trump.
item.content:encoded: The United States has refrained from imposing new tariffs on commercial aircraft and parts after an investigation into the sector, according to a proclamation signed Thursday by President Donald Trump.

item.title: Video: Over 900 Snakes Break Free Amid China Floods, Woman Dead, Many Bitten

media:content.media:description: The snakes that escaped from the farms include venomous species, including cobras.

item.description: A woman has reportedly died after being bitten by a snake and reaching the hospital late due to roadblocks and flood in Hengzhou, a city in Guangxi.
item.content:encoded: A woman has reportedly died after being bitten by a snake and reaching the hospital late due to roadblocks and flood in Hengzhou, a city in Guangxi.

item.title: Japanese Woman Arrested For Sewing Housemate's Lips Shut

media:content.media:description: Japan police arrested a woman on suspicion of assault after sewing her housemate's lips shut.

item.description: Woman arrested in Koga, Japan, for allegedly sewing a housemate’s lips shut with needle and thread.
item.content:encoded: Woman arrested in Koga, Japan, for allegedly sewing a housemate’s lips shut with needle and thread.

item.title: US To Supply Tomhawk Missiles To Germany: Chancellor Friedrich Merz

media:content.media:description: The missiles are mainly launched from submarines and warships. (File)

item.description: Merz did not say when he expected the Tomahawks to be delivered.
item.content:encoded: Merz did not say when he expected the Tomahawks to be delivered.

item.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.6 After US Scrutiny, CEO Says "Made Many Changes"

media:content.media:description: The GPT-5.6 series has three tiers - Sol, Terra and Luna.

item.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 offerings and other cutting-edge AI models, including Anthropic's Mythos series, have drawn concern over what researchers have described as an unprecedented ability to identify weaknesses in code that hackers can exploit.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 offerings and other cutting-edge AI models, including Anthropic's Mythos series, have drawn concern over what researchers have described as an unprecedented ability to identify weaknesses in code that hackers can exploit.

item.title: Heatwave Spikes Deaths In Belgium In June

media:content.media:description: New heatwave expected in Belgium in upcoming days.

item.description: There has been an excess mortality rate of 47 per cent, the Sciensano public health institute said.
item.content:encoded: There has been an excess mortality rate of 47 per cent, the Sciensano public health institute said.

item.title: Toddler Declared Dead Found Breathing Hours Later In US Hospital Morgue

media:content.media:description: Toddler declared dead found breathing in the morgue a few hours later.

item.description: A toddler discovered in a pool in a Phoenix suburb in February was declared dead before being found breathing.
item.content:encoded: A toddler discovered in a pool in a Phoenix suburb in February was declared dead before being found breathing.

item.title: 'US Jobs Are For Americans, Not Foreign Fraudsters': Vance Amid H-1B Probe

media:content.media:description: Vance made the comments during a stop at the Wisconsin Air National Guard's base.

item.description: Vance said H-1B work visa programme was originally a route for "a brilliant technology person, or a brilliant scientist, or a brilliant doctor" to work legally in the United States.
item.content:encoded: Vance said H-1B work visa programme was originally a route for "a brilliant technology person, or a brilliant scientist, or a brilliant doctor" to work legally in the United States.

item.title: Israel Threatens To Attack Iran "With Greater Force" Amid US Strikes

media:content.media:description: Israel's military is ready to strike Iran. (File)

item.description: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Iran had been weakened by the two previous military campaigns Israel launched against it.
item.content:encoded: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Iran had been weakened by the two previous military campaigns Israel launched against it.

item.title: Putin May Escalate Ukraine War Despite Peace Efforts By Trump: Report
item.description: President Vladimir Putin is rejecting calls to negotiate peace with Kyiv, with Ukraine's recent drone strikes on Russia's oil refineries and ports strengthening his resolve to keep fighting for now.
item.content:encoded: President Vladimir Putin is rejecting calls to negotiate peace with Kyiv, with Ukraine's recent drone strikes on Russia's oil refineries and ports strengthening his resolve to keep fighting for now.

item.title: At Least 28 Killed In Fire At Shoe Factory In Eastern China

media:content.media:description: People could be seen taking refuge near the windows and on the roof of the building.

item.description: Hours after the fire broke out at the Huiteng Shoes factory around noon (0400 GMT), authorities feared people were still trapped inside the building in Jinjiang city, Fujian province.
item.content:encoded: Hours after the fire broke out at the Huiteng Shoes factory around noon (0400 GMT), authorities feared people were still trapped inside the building in Jinjiang city, Fujian province.

item.title: Iran Fires 10 Ballistic Missiles At US Military Command Centre In Jordan

media:content.media:description: US bases in the region would be targeted, Iran's military said. (Image for representation)

item.description: Jordan said earlier on Thursday that it had intercepted eight missiles launched from Iran, with no casualties or damage reported.
item.content:encoded: Jordan said earlier on Thursday that it had intercepted eight missiles launched from Iran, with no casualties or damage reported.

item.title: Ali Khamenei's Final Journey: Fighter Jet Escorts Coffin Home For Burial

media:content.media:description: The burial prayer is to be led by Hossein Noori Hamedani, a 101-year-old ayatollah

item.description: Alongside Khamenei's coffin were those of family members killed in the US-Israeli strikes of February 28, the attack that marked the start of the wider Middle East war.
item.content:encoded: Alongside Khamenei's coffin were those of family members killed in the US-Israeli strikes of February 28, the attack that marked the start of the wider Middle East war.

item.title: "Milk At Home Is Australian, Tea Indian": PM Modi's Top Quotes In Melbourne

media:content.media:description: PM Modi addressed Indian community at an event in Melbourne.

item.description: PM Modi concluded a high-level summit with Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese earlier today, marking an expansion of the Comprehensive Strategic Partnership (CSP).
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1125007/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>PM Modi concluded a high-level summit with Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese earlier today, marking an expansion of the Comprehensive Strategic Partnership (CSP).
